# Product Pricelist Direct Print Company Group

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module extends the functionality of product_pricelist_direct_print to allow
select the products sold to the grouped companies.

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Usage

To use this feature, you have to:

1. Go to Sales > Products > Print Price List
2. On the page Customers select the partner related to the group.
3. Press Print or Export.
